data.title: Notification on transactions in Grigeo Group AB securities by legal entity linked to management member received.
data.description: Grigeo Group AB recently disclosed a notification regarding transactions in the company's securities carried out by a legal entity connected to a member of Grigeo Group AB's management team. For further details on this, please refer to the attached documents provided by the company.

data.title: Costco has strong Q1 results with total comps growth of 6.4% and $4.50 per share earnings, driving share prices.
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ:COST) saw its shares experiencing volatility during early trading on Friday, following the release of positive fiscal first-quarter results. Analyst insights on the company included BofA Securities' Robert Ohmes maintaining a Buy rating and setting a price target of $1,095, and Telsey Advisory Group's Joseph Feldman also keeping an Outperform rating with a price target of $1,100. Costco reported a total comps growth of 6.4% and U.S. comp growth of 5.9%, attributed to increased traffic and higher transaction sizes. Earnings came in at $4.50 per share, surpassing expectations. Ohmes raised the fiscal 2026E earnings estimate. More details are accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mineralys Therapeutics' Launch-HTN Phase 3 Trial of Lorundrostat recognized in JAMA's "Research of the Year", largest trial of aldosterone synthase inhibitor among participants with uncontrolled hypertension.
data.description: One of the significant trials of an aldosterone synthase inhibitor, Launch-HTN, conducted among individuals with uncontrolled or treatment-resistant hypertension, was chosen as one of the nine most impactful studies of 2025 by editors at JAMA.

data.title: Kaiju No. 8 game announced new character [Festive Christmas] Akari Minase. Excitement builds among players in LA.
data.description: The highly anticipated Kaiju No. 8 video game, a collaboration between Akatsuki Games, TOHO, and Production I.G, announced the introduction of a new character, Akari Minase, following the debut of Santa Narumi. The addition of Akari Minase is expected to enhance the festive experience for players. The game's release date is set for December 12, 2025.

data.title: HealthWell Foundation ranks #17 on Forbes' 2025 Top 100 Charities list with 100% fundraising efficiency.
data.description: The HealthWell Foundation®, a non-profit organization based in Germantown, Maryland, was recently acknowledged for achieving a remarkable fundraising efficiency of 100%. This foundation offers financial aid to underinsured individuals in the United States. On December 12, 2025, it was announced that the HealthWell Foundation® secured the 17th position on the 2025 list of top-ranking organizations.

data.title: Oakwood Terrace workers vote 97% in favor of strike, joining 20 other homes. CUPE 2774 president expresses frustration.
data.description: In Dartmouth, NS, long term care workers at Oakwood Terrace, represented by CUPE 2774, voted overwhelmingly with a 97% majority in favor of a strike mandate. This decision comes after 20 other CUPE long term care facilities across the country also took similar actions in the past month. President of CUPE 2774, Merissa Dawson, expressed frustration stating, "Enough is enough." The workers are advocating for better funding to establish appropriate staff-to-resident ratios that enable them to deliver quality care.

data.title: Europe rethinks crypto regulation amid push for ESMA control, sparking debate over centralized supervision vs national oversight.
data.description: With the rollout of the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) framework underway, disparities in enforcement practices within the EU are sparking discussions about the potential transfer of crypto oversight from national authorities to the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA). The varying degrees of enforcement imply a need for greater harmonization in regulations to ensure consistent application of rules across the 27 member states. This transition is prompting renewed deliberations on the optimal regulatory approach for cryptocurrencies, with some advocating for a centralized supervisory structure under ESMA to promote uniformity in enforcement.

data.description: Bitcoin encountered challenging resistance levels as the Wall Street trading week concluded, with optimistic predictions for BTC prices resurfacing.

data.title: NRI named one of America's Best Remote and Hybrid Workplaces for 2026 by Best Companies Group, highlighting their commitment.
data.description: NRI, a prominent business and technology solutions consultancy, proudly declares its selection as one of America's Best Remote and Hybrid Workplaces for 2026 by Best Companies Group. This accolade signifies NRI's dedication to providing exceptional work environments.

data.title: US seizes oil tanker near Venezuela to counter illegal oil trade despite minimal impact on sanctioned country's operations.
data.description: The recent seizure of a ship by the United States near Venezuela is expected to put pressure on the Venezuelan government. However, it may not have a significant impact on the clandestine movement of oil tankers transporting oil from countries under sanctions. This move is part of efforts to crack down on illicit oil trade activities.

data.title: Pancreatic cancer survival rates improving with novel therapies like antibody treatment; immune system targets tumors.
data.description: Oncolytics Biotech Inc., based in Vancouver, BC, announced on December 12, 2025, the development of an antibody treatment that aims to enhance the immune system's ability to target pancreatic tumors. This treatment works by obstructing the sugar-coated shields that cancer cells typically utilize to avoid detection. The breakthrough signifies a potential shift in pancreatic cancer treatment approaches, offering renewed hope for patients.
